ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height in feet and inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's current contract started */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's current contract ends */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* JSON field to store a history of injuries */,
  "education" TEXT /* Player's educational background */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Player's social media handles for fan engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's head coach */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's captain */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* JSON field to store the team's social media handles */,
  "team_email" TEXT /* Official email address of the team */,
  "team_phone" TEXT /* Official phone number of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  "league_social_media" TEXT /* JSON field to store the league's social media handles */,
  "league_email" TEXT /* Official email address of the league */,
  "league_phone" TEXT /* Official phone number of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach manages */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach's current contract started */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach's current contract ends */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the coach */,
  "coaching_philosophy" TEXT /* A brief description of the coach's coaching philosophy */,
  "coaching_records" TEXT /* JSON field to store the coach's past coaching records */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistics belong to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started by the player */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "three_point_makes" INTEGER /* Number of three-point shots made */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "highest_single_game_score" INTEGER /* Highest single-game score by the player */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "field_goal_attempts" INTEGER /* Total field goal attempts */,
  "three_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Total three-point shot attempts */,
  "free_throw_attempts" INTEGER /* Total free throw attempts */,
  "minutes_per_game" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "double_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of double-doubles achieved */,
  "triple_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of triple-doubles achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player in the game */,
  "three_point_makes" INTEGER /* Number of three-point shots made by the player in the game */,
  "three_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of three-point shots attempted by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player in the game */,
  "game_started" INTEGER /* Whether the player started the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating for the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the game */,
  "referee_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first referee */,
  "referee_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second referee */,
  "referee_3_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third referee */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of stadium capacity filled */,
  "box_score_url" TEXT /* URL to the box score of the game */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or details about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
